name: Elevation Gold Mining Corporation
description: Elevation Gold Mining Corporation is a gold and silver producer, developer, and explorer with operations in the United States. The company's primary asset is the Moss Mine, an open-pit heap leach gold-silver mine located in Mohave County, Arizona. Elevation Gold is focused on growing its resource base and expanding production at the Moss Mine, while also exploring other highly prospective targets within its extensive land package in the Walker Lane Trend.
